positive: An intricate Art Nouveau style illustration featuring a celestial map and mythological creatures. Ornate borders, gold leaf accents, detailed etching style, deep indigo and emerald palette, incorporating constellations and stylized griffin figures. Highly detailed, engraved look.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoon, pop art, simple
